content: The Transformer architecture was introduced in 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017). It relies entirely on self-attention mechanisms and eliminates recurrence.
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) combines a retriever with a generative model to ground responses in external knowledge, reducing hallucinations.
Vector databases store and index high-dimensional embeddings to enable semantic similarity search using approximate nearest-neighbour algorithms.
The capital of France is Paris. The city has been the country's political and cultural centre for over 1,000 years.
Python's asyncio library provides infrastructure for writing single-threaded concurrent code using coroutines, multiplexing I/O access over sockets and other resources.
SHA-256 is a cryptographic hash function that produces a 256-bit digest. It is considered collision-resistant for practical purposes.
Large language models are trained using self-supervised objectives on large text corpora, then aligned via RLHF or similar techniques.
The OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications lists prompt injection as the number one risk for large language model deployments.
